summary: Tested PlacementPrep Topicâ†’Difficultyâ†’Modeâ†’Test flow for Aptitude & Reasoning. All backend filtering + uniqueness tests and all critical frontend flows PASS. 9/9 new backend pytest tests pass; frontend 4-step flow, back navigation, difficulty badge color coding (emerald/violet/red), glass-bg CSS fix, and results screen all verified working with 0 console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: question_bank.py REASONING_QUESTIONS line 105: 'Mirror Image' question has 4 options but 3 are identical strings 'TRAMS' (only one distinct wrong option 'SMART'). This gives away the answer. Low priority content issue.

server.py line 229 get_questions endpoint: if both category+difficulty provided and filter yields empty pool, the code falls back silently to unfiltered set (see question_bank.py lines 214-215 and 220-221). Currently safe for valid combinations since all tested combos have data, but client has no way to know a filter was ignored. Consider returning 404 or empty array for unambiguous UX.

server.py POST /api/attempts (line 264-321): when question lookup fails entirely, returns success with score=0 and xp_earned=5 'to not break UX' â€” this silently masks bugs. Recommend returning 404 instead.

AptitudeModule.js line 136 and ReasoningModule.js submit use question.title as question_id; works because backend falls back to title lookup in question bank, but titles are not guaranteed unique across categories. Safer to send a stable id.
No ESLint errors observed in new flow files.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Aptitude + Reasoning 4-step flows, back nav, badges, results screen, Try Different Difficulty)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Aptitude + Reasoning 4-step flow is fully working as of iteration_4. Backend filters by category+difficulty, returns unique questions (no artificial duplication). Frontend testids: Aptitude uses category-{id}, difficulty-{id}, mode-practice/test, submit-answer-btn, option-{idx}, question-container. Reasoning uses reasoning- prefix on same semantic testids. Glass-bg verified as rgba(255,255,255,0.05) in dark mode. Difficulty badge colors: easy=emerald, medium=violet, hard=red. POST /api/attempts accepts question.title as question_id (fallback lookup in question bank).

features_tested.backend_aptitude_quantitative_easy_5: PASS - 5 unique easy quantitative questions returned
features_tested.backend_aptitude_logical_hard_10_unique: PASS - >=5 unique hard logical questions, no duplicates
features_tested.backend_submit_attempt_from_filtered_que: PASS - attempt scores correctly (>=70 for correct answer), awards XP
features_tested.frontend_aptitude_hard_logical_badge: PASS - badge shows 'hard' with red-500/20 classes

mocked_apis: None for this flow. Code execution module mocked (pre-existing, not in scope).
